chart.prompt: Anzahl offener Kundenrechnungen gruppiert nach Mahnstufe (0 = keine Mahnung, 1, 2, 3+), nur Rechnungen mit Status nicht bezahlt
chart.sql_string:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN i.dunning_type IS NULL OR TRIM(i.dunning_type) = '' THEN '0'
    WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('payment reminder', 'zahlungserinnerung') THEN '0'
    WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning1', 'mahnung1', 'reminder1') THEN '1'
    WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning2', 'mahnung2', 'reminder2') THEN '2'
    WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning3', 'mahnung3', 'reminder3', 'collection', 'inkasso') THEN '3+'
    ELSE '0'
  END AS "Mahnstufe",
  COUNT(*) AS "Anzahl offener Rechnungen"
FROM invoices i
WHERE
  i.payment_status <> 'completed'
  AND i.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN
      CASE
        WHEN i.dunning_type IS NULL OR TRIM(i.dunning_type) = '' THEN '0'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('payment reminder', 'zahlungserinnerung') THEN '0'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning1', 'mahnung1', 'reminder1') THEN '1'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning2', 'mahnung2', 'reminder2') THEN '2'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning3', 'mahnung3', 'reminder3', 'collection', 'inkasso') THEN '3+'
        ELSE '0'
      END = '0' THEN 0
    WHEN
      CASE
        WHEN i.dunning_type IS NULL OR TRIM(i.dunning_type) = '' THEN '0'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('payment reminder', 'zahlungserinnerung') THEN '0'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning1', 'mahnung1', 'reminder1') THEN '1'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning2', 'mahnung2', 'reminder2') THEN '2'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning3', 'mahnung3', 'reminder3', 'collection', 'inkasso') THEN '3+'
        ELSE '0'
      END = '1' THEN 1
    WHEN
      CASE
        WHEN i.dunning_type IS NULL OR TRIM(i.dunning_type) = '' THEN '0'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('payment reminder', 'zahlungserinnerung') THEN '0'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning1', 'mahnung1', 'reminder1') THEN '1'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning2', 'mahnung2', 'reminder2') THEN '2'
        WHEN LOWER(i.dunning_type) IN ('dunning3', 'mahnung3', 'reminder3', 'collection', 'inkasso') THEN '3+'
        ELSE '0'
      END = '2' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END;

en.title: Dunning stages
en.description: Open customer invoices split by current dunning level (0 / 1 / 2 / 3+) — see how the AR portfolio is escalating.

de.title: Mahnstufen-Verteilung
de.description: Offene Kundenrechnungen aufgeteilt nach Mahnstufe (0 / 1 / 2 / 3+) — sieht wie sich das Forderungsportfolio eskaliert.
